/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG "CMakeFiles/mit-game.dir/main.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/mit-game.dir/user.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/mit-game.dir/internal.cpp.o" -o mit-game  Libraries/raylib/raylib/libraylib.a Libraries/raygui/libraygui.a Libraries/raylib/raylib/libraylib.a -lm -lpthread /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libOpenGL.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libGLX.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libGLU.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/librt.a -lm -ldl
